notes: The K12.2 is a 2000W 2-way 12" powered portable PA loudspeaker. The power inlet is a standard IEC C14 (mapped to "iec") with a proprietary V-Lock locking cord mechanism — not a Neutrik PowerCON. Channel 1 combo jack is Mic/Line selectable; Channel 2 combo jack is Hi-Z/Line selectable. The 3.5mm input is stereo/consumer-level. Loop-thru XLR outputs carry the signal from each corresponding input channel; the Mix Output carries the summed signal from all inputs.

ports.name: Ch 1 Mic/Line In
ports.note: Combo XLR-F / 1/4" TRS; Mic or Line level selectable

ports.name: Ch 2 Hi-Z/Line In
ports.note: Combo XLR-F / 1/4" TRS; Hi-Z (instrument) or Line level selectable

ports.name: Stereo In
ports.note: 3.5mm TRS stereo auxiliary input for phones/computers/MP3 players

ports.name: Ch 1 Loop Thru Out
ports.note: XLR-M pass-through of Channel 1 input signal

ports.name: Ch 2 Loop Thru Out
ports.note: XLR-M pass-through of Channel 2 input signal

ports.name: Mix Out
ports.note: XLR-M line-level output of the mixed signal from all inputs

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Locking IEC C14 inlet; locking feature requires QSC V-Lock power cord; standard IEC cord also works
